CustomField.formula: IF( OR(ISBLANK(Date_debut__c), ISBLANK(Date_de_fin__c)), "⚪ Dates non définies", IF( TODAY() < DATEVALUE(Date_debut__c), "📅 Tâche en attente (démarre dans " & TEXT(DATEVALUE(Date_debut__c) - TODAY()) & " jours)", IF( (DATEVALUE(Date_de_fin__c) - TODAY()) < 0, "🚨 échéance dépassée (" & TEXT(ABS(DATEVALUE(Date_de_fin__c) - TODAY())) & " jours de retard)", IF( (DATEVALUE(Date_de_fin__c) - TODAY()) = 0, "🚨 𝐃ernier jour !", "⏳ 𝐉 — " & SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE( TEXT(DATEVALUE(Date_de_fin__c) - TODAY()), "0", "𝟎"), "1", "𝟏"), "2", "𝟐"), "3", "𝟑"), "4", "𝟒"), "5", "𝟓"), "6", "𝟔"), "7", "𝟕"), "8", "𝟖"), "9", "𝟗") & " 𝐚𝐯𝐚𝐧𝐭 𝐥𝐚 𝐟𝐢𝐧" ) ) ) )
CustomField.label: 🕒 jours restant avant la fin
